nodes.name: server.ts
nodes.summary: Interactive CLI prompt wizard for configuring Paperclip server settings, guiding the user through bind address, port, hostnames, deployment mode, and URL setup with full cancellation support.

nodes.name: promptServer
nodes.summary: Exported interactive prompt that collects server configuration options (bind mode, port, hostnames, deployment preset, URLs) and returns a validated server config object.

nodes.name: storage.ts
nodes.summary: Interactive CLI prompt wizard for configuring storage backends (local filesystem or S3-compatible), collecting bucket, region, endpoint, and prefix details with default value support.

nodes.name: promptStorage
nodes.summary: Exported interactive prompt that guides the user through choosing and configuring a storage backend, returning a complete storage configuration object.

nodes.name: defaultStorageConfig
nodes.summary: Exported function that computes and returns the default local storage configuration using the resolved Paperclip instance storage directory.

nodes.name: telemetry.ts
nodes.summary: Initializes and exposes the CLI telemetry client, providing functions to init from config, retrieve the client singleton, flush events, and track key install/import lifecycle events.

nodes.name: initTelemetry
nodes.summary: Initializes the telemetry client from a resolved config, loading or creating the persistent state file alongside the Paperclip instance root.

nodes.name: initTelemetryFromConfigFile
nodes.summary: Exported convenience wrapper that reads the config from a file path and delegates to initTelemetry.

nodes.name: banner.ts
nodes.summary: Renders the Paperclip ASCII art banner to stdout with colorized picocolors formatting when the CLI starts.

nodes.name: net.ts
nodes.summary: Provides a promise-based port availability check by attempting to bind a TCP server, resolving true if available and false if already in use.

nodes.name: path-resolver.ts
nodes.summary: Resolves file paths the same way the runtime would, expanding home-directory prefixes and searching multiple candidate directories relative to the config file and cwd.

nodes.name: resolveRuntimeLikePath
nodes.summary: Exported function that resolves a path string using home-prefix expansion and candidate directory search, mirroring the server runtime's path resolution logic.

nodes.name: version.ts
nodes.summary: Reads and re-exports the CLI version string from package.json so the rest of the codebase has a single typed version constant.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the CLI package, extending a shared base config and specifying the source include path.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Minimal Vitest configuration file for the CLI package, wiring the test runner to the TypeScript source.

nodes.name: CONTRIBUTING.md
nodes.summary: Contributor guide describing the two paths to get a pull request accepted (small focused changes vs. larger impactful changes) along with PR requirements, test expectations, and PR message guidance.

nodes.name: AGENTCOMPANIES_SPEC_INVENTORY.md
nodes.summary: Cross-reference inventory mapping Agent Companies feature specifications to their implementation locations across shared types, server services/routes, tests, CLI, UI pages/components, and API clients.

nodes.name: CLI.md
nodes.summary: Complete CLI reference covering all commands — deployment modes, context profiles, company/issue/agent/secrets/approval/activity/dashboard/heartbeat commands — with usage examples and storage configuration details.

nodes.name: CLIPHUB.md
nodes.summary: Design specification for ClipHub, the planned Paperclip company registry that enables publishing, discovering, installing, and forking agent company templates, covering architecture, data model, user flows, and V1 scope.

nodes.name: DATABASE.md
nodes.summary: Database setup guide covering all three supported database modes — embedded PostgreSQL, local Docker PostgreSQL, and hosted Supabase — with migration, backup, secret storage, and plugin namespace guidance.

nodes.name: DEPLOYMENT-MODES.md
nodes.summary: Authoritative specification for the three deployment security modes (local_trusted, authenticated+private, authenticated+public), detailing the reachability model, security policy, onboarding UX contract, and upgrade flow.

nodes.name: DEVELOPING.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive developer guide covering local setup, start commands, test commands, Docker quickstart, instance layout, database/storage configuration, worktree-local instances, health checks, secrets, and OpenClaw integration smoke tests.

nodes.name: DOCKER.md
nodes.summary: Docker deployment guide with instructions for building the image, running one-liner and compose configurations, authenticated compose setup, Claude/Codex adapter integration, Podman Quadlet systemd deployment, and smoke testing.

nodes.name: execution-semantics.md
nodes.summary: Deep technical specification of issue execution semantics: status lifecycle (backlog/todo/in_progress/blocked/in_review/done/cancelled), agent vs. user ownership, checkout model, parent/blocker relationships, liveness contracts, crash recovery, watchdog, and auto-recovery escalation.

nodes.name: issue-worktree-support.md
nodes.summary: Experimental feature note documenting current Git worktree support for issues, the hidden UI entry points, the reasons the UI is hidden, and the plan to re-enable it.

nodes.name: GOAL.md
nodes.summary: Top-level vision document describing the Paperclip project goal, the problem it solves, the two-layer architecture (control plane + execution service adapters), and the core design principle of an open orchestration standard.

nodes.name: memory-landscape.md
nodes.summary: Research survey of the agent memory ecosystem (hosted APIs, agent-centric frameworks, local-first stores), distilling Paperclip-specific takeaways about memory ownership boundaries and the recommended minimal control-plane contract.

nodes.name: OPENCLAW_ONBOARDING.md
nodes.summary: Onboarding documentation for OpenClaw, Paperclip's first external agent integration, describing the invite-link and self-registration flow for connecting remote agents to a Paperclip control plane.

nodes.name: 2026-02-16-module-system.md
nodes.summary: Detailed design plan for the Paperclip module/plugin system, covering module manifest format, hook system, database namespacing, module loading lifecycle, UI integration contract, company templates, and a phased implementation plan.

nodes.name: 2026-02-18-agent-authentication-implementation.md
nodes.summary: P0 implementation plan for local adapter JWT authentication, specifying token format, dual-path actorMiddleware, opt-in adapter capability, env injection behavior, and acceptance criteria.

nodes.name: 2026-02-18-agent-authentication.md
nodes.summary: Architectural design document for the full agent authentication and onboarding system, defining three authentication tiers (local adapter, CLI key exchange, invite-link self-registration), the OpenClaw integration model, approval flow, and implementation priorities.
